summary: Plan-only repair: deterministic validation marks all 40 PR targets in this inventory shard as security-sensitive. Each target is quarantined with non-mutating route_security for central OpenClaw security handling; no GitHub mutations, closeouts, merges, labels, comments, or fix actions are planned.
